- Row 1-27: Dark gray (G) on left, white (W) on right

- Row 44-49: Charcoal (c) and yellow (Y) in the middle
The pink bar is shrinking from the right side. Each click removes pixels from the right side of the pink bar.

- Row 28-31: GGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBYYBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBBB
So there's a 20 G's, then 18 B's, then 2 Y's, then 24 B's.

- Lower area: charcoal shape and yellow block
- Blue blocks on the right
